title: Syrian Garlic Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic stir fry made with Syrian spices and a hint of garlic.

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: your favorite mix of vegetables, e.g. bell peppers, onions, broccoli

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Syrian spice mix and cook for another minute.
Add the stir-fry sauce and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the fry and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with pita bread.
